zh.Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, Un: 英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉德福--阿文
zh.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle於1260年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾布拉德福--阿文。她於大約1276年與William de Halle結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, Un: 英国英格兰維爾爾布拉德福--阿文
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle于1260年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾布拉德福--阿文。她于大约1276年与William de Halle结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Salle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Pierre.
French: topographic name or a metonymic occupational name for someone who lived or worked at a manor house, from Old French salle ‘large room, hall’. Compare Desalle and Lasalle .

French (Sallé): from Old French salé ‘salty, salted’, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who dealt with salt meat or salt fish, or perhaps, in a figurative sense, a nickname for a witty or mordant person. Compare Sallee and Salley .

variants.name: Desalle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Marco, Reno.
Americanized form (also De Salle) of Italian Di Salle .
French: shortened form of Delasalle, a variant, with fused preposition de and definite article la ‘from the’, of Salle 1 ‘large room, hall’.

variants.name: Sallee
meanings: French (Sallée): variant of Sallé ‘salted, salty’ (see Salle ).
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

variants.name: Salles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Luiz, Ricardo, Ana, Armenia, Ernesto, Fabio, Francisco, Gustavo, Jaime, Luzia, Manuel.  French Andre, Emile, Jean-Luc.
French: variant of   Salle   1.
French: habitational name from (Les) Salles, the name of several places in various parts of France.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle was born in 1260, in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. She married William de Halle about 1276. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle est née en 1260, à Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William de Halle environ 1276. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle wurde 1260 in Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat um 1276 William de Halle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle è nata il nel 1260 nel Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William de Halle circa 1276. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, Un: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラドフォード-オン-アボン
ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salleは1260年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアブラドフォード-オン-アボンで生まれた。約1276年にWilliam de Halleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle(은)는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 브래드퍼드--아폰에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1276년 William de Halle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, England, Un: Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle nasceu em 1260, em Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com William de Halle aproximadamente 1276. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle родилась в 1260 г. в местности брадфорд-он-авон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Halle около 1276 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Catherine de la Salle nació en 1260, en Bradford-on-Avon, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William de Halle aproximadamente 1276. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en su pueblo.
